dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.evidence: `.furrow/rows/pi-row-audit-cleanup/definition.yaml` defines exactly 3 deliverables, and `.furrow/rows/pi-row-audit-cleanup/plan.json` places each one exactly once across Waves 1-3.

dimensions.name: feasibility
dimensions.evidence: `plan.json` preserves dependency order (`repair-deliverables-cli` -> `pi-step-ceremony-backfill` -> `pi-adapter-foundation-archive`), and each wave contains only one deliverable so there is no same-wave file ownership overlap.

dimensions.name: specificity
dimensions.evidence: Every `plan.json` assignment names a concrete specialist (`go-specialist` or `harness-engineer`) and includes explicit `file_ownership` paths.

dimensions.name: research-grounding
dimensions.evidence: The decisions are consistent with `.furrow/rows/pi-row-audit-cleanup/research.md` Topics 2-3, but the plan artifacts themselves do not cite specific research findings by file path plus section as required by the rubric.
